overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a billboard-lined street through industrial back alleys with trash piles, then through narrow pedestrian passages between tall buildings, and finally emerges into an open underpass area. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with neon signs, elevated walkways, and dense urban structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated metro track and digital billboards

events.description: passing under the elevated metro walkway into a more enclosed area

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a road with metal barriers, passing large digital billboards

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying a food advertisement with red and white colors
large digital billboard showing a woman in cyberpunk attire with red background
rusted metal elevated train track structure spanning across the street
red and yellow metal construction barriers lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city street with massive digital billboards and an elevated metro structure overhead. The camera walks forward along a concrete path bordered by metal barriers, with sparse vehicle traffic visible on the road to the right. The lighting is a mix of natural morning sun and artificial neon from the advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley beneath elevated infrastructure

events.description: turning left off the main street into a dark industrial back area beneath the elevated tracks
approaching a large pile of trash bags stacked against a red industrial wall

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow industrial passage and walking past trash containers and yellow support beams

entered.detail: thick yellow industrial support beams holding up the elevated structure
large mound of garbage bags in black and blue colors stacked against a wall
tall brick building facade covered with numerous air conditioning units and external piping
smooth red painted concrete wall of an industrial building

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a dark industrial back alley beneath the elevated metro tracks. The space is enclosed by yellow support beams and red industrial walls, with a prominent pile of trash bags in blue and black visible ahead. The lighting shifts to low artificial light as the scene moves into the sheltered underbelly of the city infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian alley between residential buildings

events.description: emerging from the industrial trash area into a narrow pedestrian alley with other people walking

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley between tall brick buildings, passing other pedestrians walking in various directions

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction through the narrow passage

entered.detail: tall brown brick residential building with multiple windows and external air conditioning units
metal fire escape ladders and platforms attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial area, the scene opens into a narrow pedestrian alley between tall brick buildings. Sunlight streams down from above, creating high contrast lighting. Several pedestrians are visible walking through the passage, and fire escape ladders run down the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with food vendors and closed shops

events.description: passing a glowing red neon sign for Burrito XXL shop on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through a very narrow passage with closed metal shutters and neon signs, passing cardboard boxes and debris

entered.detail: red neon sign with yellow text reading BURRITO XXL above a shop entrance
closed corrugated metal security shutters on shop fronts
stacked cardboard boxes and discarded packaging along the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The alley becomes even narrower as the camera moves through a commercial passage with closed metal shutters and scattered cardboard boxes. A prominent red neon sign for Burrito XXL glows on the right wall. The space is dimly lit with a mix of artificial neon and minimal natural light filtering from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open underpass area with storage and parking

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into a wide open area under a concrete overpass
emerging into bright sunlight after the dark narrow passage

agents.ego_description: exiting the narrow alley and entering a wide underpass area with buildings and trees visible in the distance ahead

notable_agents.action: standing near a cart loaded with cardboard boxes

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass forming a ceiling over the open area
low building with distinctive orange roof and curved architecture
green trees visible in the distance beyond the underpass exit
wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the narrow alley into a wide open area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting shifts dramatically to bright natural sunlight, revealing an orange building structure, parked vehicles, and trees visible in the distance. A person stands near a cart on the right, and graffiti covers the walls of this transitional urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, billboard-lined city street into the claustrophobic depths of urban alleys before emerging into a wide, sunlit underpass. It begins by moving along a concrete path beneath an elevated metro structure, where natural morning light blends with the glow of massive digital advertisements. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts abruptly into a dim industrial back alley characterized by yellow support beams, red walls, and piles of trash. The scene then opens into a narrow pedestrian passage between tall brick buildings with streaming sunlight and fire escapes, before tightening further into a commercial corridor marked by closed metal shutters and a glowing red Burrito XXL sign. Finally, the camera exits the confined space into a vast open area beneath a concrete overpass, where the lighting transforms into bright daylight revealing graffiti-covered walls, parked vehicles, and distant greenery.
